title: coryphantha aulacothele
intro: Coryphantha aulacothele, also known as the red-flowered pincushion cactus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Coryphantha aulacothele include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. Coryphantha aulacothele can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
